name: The "Extinguishes All Sound Created by Your Influence" Technique

issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'during this turn' which is a temporary effect limited to your current turn phase.
Target must specify card name filter. Text requires 'Select up to 1 of your [Trafalgar Law] cards'. Current scope lacks cardName constraint.
Second effect (DrawCard) is completely absent from card text. No draw effect exists in the official text. This action should not be present.

Missing conditional action: 'if the selected card attacks during this turn, your opponent cannot activate [Blocker]'. This requires a Counter trigger on attack with a condition blocking opponent's [Blocker] activation.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Select up to 1 of your [Trafalgar Law] cards and that card gains +2000 power during this turn. Then, if the selected card attacks during this turn, your opponent cannot activate [Blocker].
